import React from 'react'; import { Instagram, Phone, Mail, ArrowRight, MapPin } from 'lucide-react'; import BarberBackground from './BarberBackground'; const LandingPage = ({ onNavigate }) => { const gallery = [ { id: 1, title: "Degradê Americano", url: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1503951914875-452162b0f3f1?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=500" }, { id: 2, title: "Corte Social Premium", url: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1621605815971-fbc98d665033?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=500" }, { id: 3, title: "Barba Terapia", url: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1599351431202-1e0f0137899a?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=500" }, { id: 4, title: "Pompadour Moderno", url: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1593702295094-ada74bc4a149?auto=format&fit=crop&q=80&w=500" }, ]; return (

); }; export default LandingPage;
